subcodes.first_line: Should that Light of Guidance set beneath that horizon, and that Star of Faithfulness decline from that dawning-place, yet praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر آن نور هدی از آن افق غروب نمود و آن نجم وفا از آن مطلع افول ولی الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
